body:
So this was supposed to be a light fun little fic based on this. But the odd thing with my muse is, she takes stories where she wants them to go sometimes, lol.

“No wait! You can’t just absorb them!” The trans girl paniced halfway through the sentence, trying to hold onto the silk rope as it was slowly being sucked in, being absorbed into the trans slime girl’s see through arm. The slime girl grinned, moving her arm to let the rope slip deeper inside, where the knots unraveled easily as they sunk beneath her skin. She had a gentle smile, not teasing, but trying to be reassuring watching her partners flustered face.

The human girl sighed, shaking her head. She really wanted to be a good domme. She had been doing so much studying and research on how to do this correctly, but nothing prepared her for a partner that could have the ropes pass through her flesh.

The slime lifted her partner’s chin with a semi-solid hand, so that they looked each other in the eye. “Don’t think so hard about ‘doing it right.’ There’s not a right way.” the slime girl expressed to her partner, “It’s just us. And I am very much enjoying you trying things.”

A blush spread over the human’s face, holding the silk rope in her hands, she stared at it thinking. She hesitated for a moment, then gently slid her fingers experimentally into the slime girl’s arm, feeling the wonderful yet strange resistance, the way her own fingers shifted the lovely girl’s gelatinous form, watching the indentions made with her finger, slowly pop back into place. Her slime partner laughed at the tickling sensation, shifting herself form to wrap an arm softly around her partner’s waist.

The human girl, bit her lip, looking at and through her partner at the same time, “What if… what if we tried something else?” She suggested, pulling the remaining submerged of the rope lovely lady before her. The slime girl nodded enthusiastically, causing small ripples glide across her form, with slight sparkles where the light caught them just right.

As the rippling faded, the sparkles returned as glint in the slime girl’s eyes as forced the girls human hands, rope and all into her flesh, “Feel this! It’s just you and I touching…together, less distinct, more us.” She bit her lip as a huge grin showed in her eyes, “Look at how close we are, I mean technically you are inside me right now.”

The human blushed at the suggestive suggestion. She was indeed inside her girlfriend, her fingers engulfed by the slime girl’s less than solid flesh, feeling a gentle warmth all over her hands. The way her partner’s form matched her shape, forming itself around her wrists, fingers, hands, it was more intimate than she could have dreamed. There was nothing to bind them, no silk keeping them in place, just… closeness, togetherness. The human’s eyes lit up with the realization this wasn’t about control. It was about something that was simultaneously far more intimate and exposed at the same time.

“Can I try something?” the slime girl hesitated when asking, with far less confidence than usual, “I mean, it’s okay if you’re not ready, but…” Her voice trailed off, her fingers tracing patterns on her lover’s thigh, just for the additional contact. The human girl leaned in, giving her partner a kiss on the forehead, “I trust you.”

The slime girl pulled the human girl close, wrapping herself around her around her lover. “Relax,” she whispered, her voice strange now, as it vibrated through their contact. The human’s eyes widened as her partner’s body enveloped her, swallowing her from the neck down. The sensation fried her brain, leaving her at a loss for words, as every inch of her body slid inside her lover.

Inside, the slime shifted, her essence slipping into the available openings, the tip of her cock and her backdoor. The human moaned as she her girlfriend poured inside of her, the sensation of being filled in multiple ways that seemed to fit just right overwhelmed her. The contact allowed their minds to connect, thoughts connecting, emotions becoming one until it was impossible to tell where one began and the other ended. And at that moment, the slime girl allowing her own will sink below her partners, submitting entirely, with no ropes needed.
